tenant.notes:
Scott Megna 5626 Peabody Tenant:
	Good morning,Mr Issac I can see on my app that I will be getting the check today I will be paying 2,500 today and tomorrow then 700 every week till zero balance apologizes for the delay but will have this cleared up soon    

Isaac Bahary:
	2500 today and 2500 tomorrow, correct?

Scott Megna 5626 Peabody Tenant:
	No gonna do 2500 today and Tommy when the check fully clears ,then 700 every week till zero ba
	Balance 
	A combo of the 2 days cause don't know if full check will all clear today when I deposit it 

Isaac Bahary:
	You mean 2500 total between today and tomorrow?

Scott Megna 5626 Peabody Tenant:
	Yes sir just cause I don't know if woke check will clear today .then 700 a week till it's cleared ,
	And that 700 a week starting Fri 
	So a total of 3,200 this week

incoming.body: Good afternoon. As soon as possible.

incoming.body: This is Victoria, I saw that I had a missed call from you and was wondering if the landlord had gotten back to you?

thread.body: This is Victoria, I saw that I had a missed call from you and was wondering if the landlord had gotten back to you?

Hi Victoria, thank you for reaching out. Yes, the landlord did get back to me. He is willing to rent a unit at College Park for 2 students with a minimum 12-month lease.

The rent terms are as follows:
• $1,000 monthly rent
• $75 water & sewer
• $60 internet
• Tenant(s) will need to place gas and electric service in their name.

Please review the rental requirements below:

• All tenants 18 years of age or older must complete a credit check, background check, and income verification. A credit score of 630 or higher is required.
• Applications with any prior eviction history will not be accepted.
• To qualify financially, gross monthly income must be at least $2,500, averaged over the last 12 months.
• No smoking of any kind is permitted on the property.
• Upon signing the lease, the first month’s rent and full security deposit will be due.

Here is the application link:
https://apply.link/Q9tkkL4

Please let me know if you have any questions or once the application has been submitted.
Hi good afternoon, we are still interested in moving forward with signing the lease. Our preferred move in date is May 1st and we would like to choose the unit ourselves. Thank you

thread.body: Hi there! This is Karley Skultety. I’ve recently reached out to get more information about apartment on 2708 Wehnwood Rd, Altoona PA 16601. Last I heard from anyone was Thursday and was wondering if the 1 bedroom 1 bathroom unit was still available?
Hi Karley, we don't have any more one-bedroom units available.  Thank you
Your website says you still have 2 units available just so you're aware! Thanks
This is an error. Thank you.

Hi, this is Tri Star Realty Leasing. We received your inquiry and would love to help you find your next home. Wehnwood Court Apartments D2B inquiry - redirecting to available units D1/D3 Please reply or call us anytime!
So there are available units?

incoming.body:
I understand that your rental criteria includes a 650 credit score requirement. While my current score is below that threshold, I want to assure you that I am actively working to improve it.

I am currently enrolled with Lexington Law, a professional credit repair firm, and my credit profile is being reviewed and corrected. Some negative items are in dispute and in the process of being resolved.

My credit challenges were due to my son passing And relocating.. my financial situation is now stable. I have steady income and can provide pay stubs, bank statements, and references to demonstrate my ability to pay rent on time.

I am also willing to provide 2-3 months to provide additional assurance.

Thank you for considering my application. I am responsible, reliable, and committed to maintaining a positive rental history.

Sincerely,
Chyna Robbins
[PHONE_REMOVED]

thread.body: Here is the application link: https://apply.link/zQpqWdc

I understand that your rental criteria includes a 650 credit score requirement. While my current score is below that threshold, I want to assure you that I am actively working to improve it.

I am currently enrolled with Lexington Law, a professional credit repair firm, and my credit profile is being reviewed and corrected. Some negative items are in dispute and in the process of being resolved.

My credit challenges were due to my son passing And relocating.. my financial situation is now stable. I have steady income and can provide pay stubs, bank statements, and references to demonstrate my ability to pay rent on time.

I am also willing to provide 2-3 months to provide additional assurance.

Thank you for considering my application. I am responsible, reliable, and committed to maintaining a positive rental history.

Sincerely,
Chyna Robbins

incoming.body:
e reason for moving is because I’m fleeing domestic violence, I have very good standing with my current landlord of 5 years and can happily use her as a reference. But I’m moving out for safety and privacy. 

Ideally, I’m hoping for a mid April move in if timing works out with the units. I’d also love to come back next week to tour the upgraded units once the countertops are finished if that’s still an option!

Please let me know the best next steps for applying and anything you may need from me I’m ready to move forward whenever you are! This is very exciting and big to me, I’ve toured about 12 places during this journey of mine and your apartments are the only ones I’ve felt sure of for my son and I. 

Thank you so much again, I really appreciate your time and help!

thread.body:
e reason for moving is because I’m fleeing domestic violence, I have very good standing with my current landlord of 5 years and can happily use her as a reference. But I’m moving out for safety and privacy. 

Ideally, I’m hoping for a mid April move in if timing works out with the units. I’d also love to come back next week to tour the upgraded units once the countertops are finished if that’s still an option!

Please let me know the best next steps for applying and anything you may need from me I’m ready to move forward whenever you are! This is very exciting and big to me, I’ve toured about 12 places during this journey of mine and your apartments are the only ones I’ve felt sure of for my son and I. 

Thank you so much again, I really appreciate your time and help!

Hi Matan! 😊

My name is Zoie Wright. I toured apartments today with Aaron and absolutely LOVED them. I wanted to reach out and introduce myself directly and follow up on everything we discussed.

I’m currently working with a housing voucher through cobra and have all of my paperwork ready to go. I’m very motivated to move forward quickly, I just may need a little guidance on the application process since this is my first time using a program like this.

Aaron mentioned units 104 and 503 as the upgraded options with the newer kitchens, and those are definitely my top choices. I especially love the idea of the updated appliances and finishes, so I’d be very interested in either of those depending on pricing and availability.

For a little context, it would just be me and my young son living in the unit. I’m very clean, quiet, and take a lot of pride in my home, so finding a place that feels like a good long term fit is really important to me  and this community honestly felt perfect. Th
Sorry that was long! I'd love to start an application process with you, and I have a cobra voucher, call or text me when you get a chance
Hi Zoie! Please send your 2025 W-2, the three most recent pay stubs, the voucher, and a photo ID to [EMAIL_REMOVED]. Thank you. Matan with Tri Star Realty.

Hi Matan, thank you so much for the update. I really appreciate you getting back to me, and I completely understand things get busy. I’m very interested, so I’ll look forward to hearing from you next week. Thanks again for your time and consideration!

Hi Matan, I responded in email but wanted to text too. Thank you so much for getting back to me. 

I just called my caseworker, and she asked me to check with you about the property taxes for this address. Could you please let me know whether the property taxes are paid to a township or to the “City of Altoona”? 

She said that information will help her determine if whether my housing voucher can be used at this property.

Thank you again for your time and help. I really appreciate it, and I look forward to hearing back from you.

Best, Zoie Wright

My caseworker gave me this map, and the only area I’m not able to rent in is the section marked in red pen if you zoom in. Based on where this property seems to be located, I’m hoping it may fall outside of that area and that the property taxes are paid to Logan Township, Juniata Township, or another municipality rather than the City of Altoona.
I can't confirm at this time. I'll leave it up to you if you want to apply. I can't guarantee that we will approve your application.

Hi Matan, I responded in email but wanted to text too. Thank you so much for getting back to me. 

I just called my caseworker, and she asked me to check with you about the property taxes for this address. Could you please let me know whether the property taxes are paid to a township or to the “City of Altoona”? 

She said that information will help her determine if whether my housing voucher can be used at this property.

Thank you again for your time and help. I really appreciate it, and I look forward to hearing back from you.

Best, Zoie Wright

My caseworker gave me this map, and the only area I’m not able to rent in is the section marked in red pen if you zoom in. Based on where this property seems to be located, I’m hoping it may fall outside of that area and that the property taxes are paid to Logan Township, Juniata Township, or another municipality rather than the City of Altoona.
I can't confirm at this time. I'll leave it up to you if you want to apply. I can't guarantee that we will approve your application.

Hi Matan, I was able to confirm that this property is eligible with my voucher, and I have now submitted my application. I would truly appreciate your consideration for myself and my son. My first reference is my current landlord, and I’d be glad to provide any additional information if needed. Thank you again for your time.
Hi Zoie, I received your application. Do you have your caseworker's contact information? I would like to speak with her.
